headline: Top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index during Thursday's after-hours session.
summary: As the regular session of the US market on Thursday comes to an end, let's delve into the after-hours session and discover the top S&P500 gainers and losers shaping the post-market sentiment.

headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Stock Jumps After Dell's Massive Q1 Beat On AI Demand
summary: Dell's blowout Q1 results and optimistic AI server revenue outlook boost HPE stock.

headline: HPE and Rowan University Expand Partnership to Accelerate Research and Strengthen Student Workforce Readiness
summary: HOUSTON & GLASSBORO, N.J., May 28, 2026--HPE and Rowan University expand a strategic partnership to advance research, enhance learning, and strengthen campus technology infrastructure.
